name: Playbook Content API
description: Structured content feeds for the Playbook responsible gambling brand system. All content is CC0-licensed and free to use.

messages.description: Core messages by pillar and touchpoint

myths.description: Myth-busting content in 3 formats (social card, article, quiz)

ctas.description: Calls-to-action by function and urgency level

assets.description: Asset manifest with URLs, dimensions, and metadata

games.description: Game education guides (one JSON file per game)

tokenDescription: Content contains placeholder tokens in {{DOUBLE_BRACES}}. Replace with your operator values before deploying.
